CREATE TABLE test_dsn (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name IN (SELECT name FROM test_dsn WHERE id = 1);
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name = (SELECT name FROM test_dsn WHERE id = 2);
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name = 'DataSource3' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dsn WHERE id = 3) > 0;
SELECT * FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name NOT IN (SELECT name FROM test_dsn);
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name = (SELECT name FROM test_dsn WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_dsn));
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name = (SELECT name FROM test_dsn WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dsn WHERE name LIKE 'DataSource%'));
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_dsn WHERE test_dsn.name = odbc_dsn.dsn_name);
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name IN (SELECT name FROM test_dsn WHERE id <= 1) RETURNING *;
DELETE FROM odbc_dsn WHERE dsn_name = (SELECT name FROM test_dsn ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
